scripts.serve: cd frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build && cd ../server && bun install && bun run start
scripts.rebuild: cd frontend && rm -rf build node_modules && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build && cd ../server && rm -rf node_modules && bun install
scripts.install:all: cd frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../server && bun install
